results.title: Stock Market Today (May 1, 2026): Nasdaq, S&P 500 add to banner rally with another record close to end the week
Stock Market Today, May 1: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Power to New Highs
May Starts Merrily on Apple Earnings, Peace Hopes
Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq jump to fresh records as AI trade fuels tech rally, Apple stock jumps

results.summary: Nasdaq +0.89% to 25,114.44 (record). S&P 500 +0.29% to 7,230.12 (record). Dow -0.31% to 49,499.27. Apple +3%+ on earnings beat. April delivered ~10% gains for broader market, best month in 5 years. Roblox -24% on guidance cut.
